channel.title: Frontier
channel.description: A short twice-daily audio walk through one landmark study — biohacking, AI, learning, cannabis, finance, and frontier tech, explained in plain language by two hosts.
channel.itunes:author: Frontier
channel.itunes:summary: A short twice-daily audio walk through one landmark study — biohacking, AI, learning, cannabis, finance, and frontier tech, explained in plain language by two hosts.

item.title: Frontier — July 1, 2026
item.description: Why the human mind can only hold about seven things at once, and the tiny shortcut that let AI neural networks finally go deep.
item.itunes:summary: Why the human mind can only hold about seven things at once, and the tiny shortcut that let AI neural networks finally go deep.

item.title: Frontier — June 30, 2026
item.description: How two astronomers found the first planet around a sun-like star in 1995, by watching its gravity make the star wobble.
item.itunes:summary: How two astronomers found the first planet around a sun-like star in 1995, by watching its gravity make the star wobble.

item.title: Frontier — June 28, 2026
item.description: Two studies on intellectual honesty: the generation effect, why you remember what you produce yourself, and Volkow's sober accounting of marijuana's real risks.
item.itunes:summary: Two studies on intellectual honesty: the generation effect, why you remember what you produce yourself, and Volkow's sober accounting of marijuana's real risks.

item.title: Frontier — June 27, 2026
item.description: How a randomized study tied an eight-week mindfulness course to changes in the brain and a stronger antibody response to a flu shot.
item.itunes:summary: How a randomized study tied an eight-week mindfulness course to changes in the brain and a stronger antibody response to a flu shot.

item.title: Frontier — June 26, 2026
item.description: The double helix that explained how life copies itself, and the two-network forgery game that launched modern AI image generation.
item.itunes:summary: The double helix that explained how life copies itself, and the two-network forgery game that launched modern AI image generation.

item.title: Frontier — Thursday, June 25, 2026
item.description: Two chemists isolate THC from hashish in 1964, and Tversky and Kahneman map the three mental shortcuts that quietly bias human judgment.
item.itunes:summary: Two chemists isolate THC from hashish in 1964, and Tversky and Kahneman map the three mental shortcuts that quietly bias human judgment.

item.title: Frontier — June 23, 2026
item.description: Two Google landmarks: the Sycamore chip's contested quantum-supremacy run, and DeepMind's Deep Q-Network learning 49 Atari games from pixels and score alone.
item.itunes:summary: Two Google landmarks: the Sycamore chip's contested quantum-supremacy run, and DeepMind's Deep Q-Network learning 49 Atari games from pixels and score alone.

item.title: Frontier — June 22, 2026
item.description: Two beloved explanations fall apart: the runner's high turns out to run on your body's own cannabis-like molecules, and the stock market swings far more wildly than dividends can justify.
item.itunes:summary: Two beloved explanations fall apart: the runner's high turns out to run on your body's own cannabis-like molecules, and the stock market swings far more wildly than dividends can justify.

item.title: Frontier — June 21, 2026
item.description: Two studies: how a glowing screen before bed cuts your sleep hormone and delays your body clock, and the real research behind the 10,000-hour rule.
item.itunes:summary: Two studies: how a glowing screen before bed cuts your sleep hormone and delays your body clock, and the real research behind the 10,000-hour rule.

item.title: Frontier — June 20, 2026
item.description: Two studies that each turned a tiny change into a revolution: the one-letter mRNA swap behind the COVID vaccines, and AlexNet, the 2012 image contest entry that kicked off the modern AI era.
item.itunes:summary: Two studies that each turned a tiny change into a revolution: the one-letter mRNA swap behind the COVID vaccines, and AlexNet, the 2012 image contest entry that kicked off the modern AI era.

item.title: Frontier — June 19, 2026
item.description: Two studies: the 1990 discovery of the brain's cannabinoid receptor, and the coffee-mug experiment that proved owning something makes you value it more.
item.itunes:summary: Two studies: the 1990 discovery of the brain's cannabinoid receptor, and the coffee-mug experiment that proved owning something makes you value it more.

item.title: Frontier — June 17, 2026
item.description: Two landmark studies: the first direct detection of gravitational waves from colliding black holes, and AlphaGo becoming the first program to beat a professional human at Go.
item.itunes:summary: Two landmark studies: the first direct detection of gravitational waves from colliding black holes, and AlphaGo becoming the first program to beat a professional human at Go.

item.title: Frontier — Monday, June 15, 2026
item.description: Two studies on turning belief into proof: the 2017 trial that made CBD an FDA-approved seizure medicine, and Markowitz's 1952 paper that turned diversification into the math behind modern investing.
item.itunes:summary: Two studies on turning belief into proof: the 2017 trial that made CBD an FDA-approved seizure medicine, and Markowitz's 1952 paper that turned diversification into the math behind modern investing.

item.title: Frontier — June 14, 2026
item.description: Two hidden systems: how your brain power-washes itself during sleep, and why the least skilled are often the most confident.
item.itunes:summary: Two hidden systems: how your brain power-washes itself during sleep, and why the least skilled are often the most confident.

item.title: Frontier — June 13, 2026
item.description: Two studies that rhyme: the testing effect, why quizzing yourself beats re-reading, and AlphaFold, the AI that cracked the 50-year protein-folding problem.
item.itunes:summary: Two studies that rhyme: the testing effect, why quizzing yourself beats re-reading, and AlphaFold, the AI that cracked the 50-year protein-folding problem.
